name: Core Laboratories Inc. /DE/
summary: PART I General Core Laboratories Inc. is a Delaware corporation. We were established in 1936 and are one of the worlds leading providers of proprietary and patented reservoir description and production enhancement services and products to the oil and gas industry, primarily through client relationships with many of the worlds major, national and independent oil companies.
